title: Support covergroup coverpoint bins with sample() and get_inst_coverage() (#7099)
body:
## Summary

Implement initial `covergroup` functional coverage support (IEEE 1800-2017 §19.2–19.5, §19.8). Coverpoints with explicit value bins can now be defined, sampled at runtime, and queried for coverage percentage.

## Issue
Fixes #7099 

## Changes

**New files (3):**
- `src/V3Covergroup.cpp` / `.h` — AST transform pass: converts `AstCoverpoint`/`AstCoverBin` nodes into runtime initialization calls (AstCStmt for constructor builder chain, AstCMethodHard for sample/query)
- `include/verilated_covergroup.h` — Runtime library: `VlCovergroup` → `VlCoverpoint` → `VlCovBinDef` → `VlCovBinRange`, with define→finalize→sample lifecycle and coverage caching

**Parser (`src/verilog.y`):**
- `cover_point` rules: create `AstCoverpoint` nodes instead of `BBCOVERIGN`
- `bins_or_options`: create `AstCoverBin` nodes with range lists; `bins_keyword` tracks `m_coverBinKind` state
- `bins_orBraE`: wire `[]`/`[N]` array syntax through (guarded with `E_UNSUPPORTED` in codegen)
- Remove `BBCOVERIGN` from `covergroup_declaration`

**AST nodes (`src/V3AstNodeOther.h`, `src/V3AstNodes.cpp`, `src/V3AstAttr.h`):**
- Add `AstCoverpoint` (op1=expr, op2=iff (reserved), op3=bins) and `AstCoverBin` (name, kind, isArray, isDefault, op1=ranges)
- Add `VCoverBinKind` enum class, `VBasicDTypeKwd::COVERGROUP_RUNTIME` opaque type
- Add 4 `VCMethod` entries: `COVERGROUP_FINALIZE`, `COVERGROUP_SAMPLE_CP`, `COVERGROUP_GET_INST_COV`, `COVERGROUP_SET_INST_NAME`

**Infrastructure:**
- `src/V3Global.h`: `m_useCovergroup` flag for conditional `#include`
- `src/V3EmitCHeaders.cpp`: emit `#include "verilated_covergroup.h"` when needed
- `src/V3EmitCFunc.cpp`: skip reset for `VlCovergroup` (default-constructed)
- `src/V3AstNodes.cpp`: `cTypeRecurse` recognizes `VlCovergroup`
- `src/V3Width.cpp`: preserve `AstCgOptionAssign` for V3Covergroup pass
- `src/Verilator.cpp`: call `V3Covergroup::covergroupAll()` in pipeline
- `src/CMakeLists.txt`, `src/Makefile_obj.in`: compile V3Covergroup.cpp

## Test
- Added `test_regress/t/t_covergroup_basic.{v,py}` — 4-bin coverpoint, verifies 0%→25%→50%→75%→100% coverage progression via `checkr` macro

---
Written by Claude Code and PlanV GmbH.

Reviewed by YilouWang.
